name: JellyRequest
description: Netflix-style content discovery and request system for Jellyfin with Radarr/Sonarr integration.
overview: Transform your Jellyfin server into a modern streaming platform where users can discover, browse, and request movies and TV shows with one click. Features a Netflix-inspired interface with horizontal carousels, smart search, and seamless integration with Radarr and Sonarr for automatic content acquisition.

changes: Netflix-style discovery interface with horizontal carousels
Full TMDB integration for movie and TV show metadata
Seamless Radarr integration for movie requests
Seamless Sonarr integration for TV show requests
Responsive design for desktop and tablet

releases.changelog: Initial release with Netflix-style discovery and request system

configPage.summary: Configure TMDB, Radarr, and Sonarr settings for content requests

settings.name: TmdbApiKey
settings.label: TMDB API Key
settings.help: Get your API key from https://www.themoviedb.org/settings/api

settings.name: RadarrUrl
settings.label: Radarr URL
settings.help: Full URL to your Radarr instance (e.g., http://localhost:7878)

settings.name: RadarrApiKey
settings.label: Radarr API Key
settings.help: API key from Radarr Settings > General > Security

settings.name: SonarrUrl
settings.label: Sonarr URL
settings.help: Full URL to your Sonarr instance (e.g., http://localhost:8989)

settings.name: SonarrApiKey
settings.label: Sonarr API Key
settings.help: API key from Sonarr Settings > General > Security

settings.name: AllowRegularUserRequests
settings.label: Allow Regular Users to Make Requests
settings.help: If unchecked, only administrators can make requests

settings.name: MaxRequestsPerUser
settings.label: Max Requests Per User
settings.help: Maximum number of active requests per user

settings.name: PollingIntervalMinutes
settings.label: Status Polling Interval (minutes)
settings.help: How often to check Radarr/Sonarr for request status updates
